heading: Printing and binding costs
label: 6919 Printing and binding costs
text: For purposes of costs relating to printing and binding, including the costs of personnel detailed from the Government Publishing Office, the Commission shall be deemed to be a committee of the Congress.
notes: Change of Name“Government Publishing Office” substituted for “Government Printing Office” in text on authority of , set out as a note preceding , Public Printing and Documents.section 1301(b) of Pub. L. 113–235section 301 of Title 44
